content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "說中文",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你會說中文嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ huì shuō zhōngwén ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hui4 shuo1 zhong1wen2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Can you speak Chinese?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어를 할 줄 아세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "會一點，但是不太會。",
          "pinyin": "Huì yīdiǎn, dànshì bù tài huì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hui4 yi1dian3, dan4shi4 bu4 tai4 hui4.",
          "translation_en": "A little, but not very well.",
          "translation_ko": "조금 할 줄 알지만, 잘하지는 못해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你學了幾個月？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xué le jǐ ge yuè?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xue2 le5 ji3 ge5 yue4?",
          "translation_en": "How many months have you been studying?",
          "translation_ko": "몇 달 동안 배웠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "半年了，我還在慢慢學。",
          "pinyin": "Bàn nián le, wǒ hái zài mànmàn xué.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ban4 nian2 le5, wo3 hai2 zai4 man4man4 xue2.",
          "translation_en": "Half a year. I'm still learning slowly.",
          "translation_ko": "반년 됐어요. 아직 천천히 배우고 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你覺得說中文難嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ juéde shuō zhōngwén nán ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 jue2de5 shuo1 zhong1wen2 nan2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Do you think speaking Chinese is difficult?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어 말하기가 어렵다고 생각하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "有一點難，可是我越來越進步了。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu yīdiǎn nán, kěshì wǒ yuèláiyuè jìnbù le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3 yi1dian3 nan2, ke3shi4 wo3 yue4lai2yue4 jin4bu4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "It's a little difficult, but I'm making more and more progress.",
          "translation_ko": "조금 어렵지만, 점점 더 발전하고 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "加油！你已經說得很好了。",
          "pinyin": "Jiāyóu! Nǐ yǐjīng shuō de hěn hǎo le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jia1you2! Ni3 yi3jing1 shuo1 de5 hen3 hao3 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Keep it up! You already speak very well.",
          "translation_ko": "힘내세요! 벌써 잘 말하고 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "謝謝，我會繼續努力。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, wǒ huì jìxù nǔlì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5, wo3 hui4 ji4xu4 nu3li4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. I will keep working hard.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 계속 노력할게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How long has B been learning Chinese?",
          "question_ko": "B는 중국어를 얼마나 배웠습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Three months", "Half a year", "One year"],
          "options_ko": ["세 달", "반년", "일 년"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Tell me about your Chinese learning experience. How long have you been studying? What is difficult for you?"
    },
    {
      "title": "會煮菜",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你會煮菜嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ huì zhǔ cài ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hui4 zhu3 cai4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Can you cook?",
          "translation_ko": "요리할 줄 아세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "會，我喜歡煮菜。",
          "pinyin": "Huì, wǒ xǐhuān zhǔ cài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hui4, wo3 xi3huan1 zhu3 cai4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I like cooking.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 요리하는 것을 좋아해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你常常煮什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ chángcháng zhǔ shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 chang2chang2 zhu3 shen2me5?",
          "translation_en": "What do you often cook?",
          "translation_ko": "자주 무엇을 요리하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我常常煮炒飯和青菜。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ chángcháng zhǔ chǎofàn hé qīngcài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 chang2chang2 zhu3 chao3fan4 he2 qing1cai4.",
          "translation_en": "I often make fried rice and vegetables.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 자주 볶음밥과 채소를 요리해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "聽起來很簡單，可是我覺得煮菜很難。",
          "pinyin": "Tīng qǐlái hěn jiǎndān, kěshì wǒ juéde zhǔ cài hěn nán.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ting1 qi3lai2 hen3 jian3dan1, ke3shi4 wo3 jue2de5 zhu3 cai4 hen3 nan2.",
          "translation_en": "Sounds simple, but I think cooking is hard.",
          "translation_ko": "간단해 보이는데, 저는 요리가 어렵다고 생각해요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不會啦，你慢慢學就會了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù huì la, nǐ mànmàn xué jiù huì le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hui4 la5, ni3 man4man4 xue2 jiu4 hui4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "No, it's not. If you learn slowly, you'll get it.",
          "translation_ko": "아니에요. 천천히 배우면 할 수 있게 돼요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你可以教我嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ke3yi3 jiao1 wo3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Can you teach me?",
          "translation_ko": "저를 가르쳐 주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "當然可以！我們一起煮。",
          "pinyin": "Dāngrán kěyǐ! Wǒmen yīqǐ zhǔ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dang1ran2 ke3yi3! Wo3men5 yi1qi3 zhu3.",
          "translation_en": "Of course! Let's cook together.",
          "translation_ko": "물론이죠! 같이 요리해요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What does B often cook?",
          "question_ko": "B는 자주 무엇을 요리합니까?",
          "options_en": ["Noodles and soup", "Fried rice and vegetables", "Fish and rice"],
          "options_ko": ["국수와 국", "볶음밥과 채소", "생선과 밥"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, paying attention to the tone of questions and responses.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Can you cook? What do you like to cook? Is cooking easy or difficult for you?"
    },
    {
      "title": "不會看中文",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你會看中文嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ huì kàn zhōngwén ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hui4 kan4 zhong1wen2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Can you read Chinese?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어를 읽을 줄 아세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "完全不會，我只會說一點。",
          "pinyin": "Wánquán bù huì, wǒ zhǐ huì shuō yīdiǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wan2quan2 bu4 hui4, wo3 zhi3 hui4 shuo1 yi1dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Not at all. I can only speak a little.",
          "translation_ko": "전혀 못 해요. 조금 말할 줄만 알아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "那你看菜單的時候怎麼辦？",
          "pinyin": "Nà nǐ kàn càidān de shíhou zěnme bàn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Na4 ni3 kan4 cai4dan1 de5 shi2hou5 zen3me5 ban4?",
          "translation_en": "Then what do you do when you look at a menu?",
          "translation_ko": "그럼 메뉴를 볼 때 어떻게 해요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我請朋友幫忙，或者看照片。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ qǐng péngyǒu bāngmáng, huòzhě kàn zhàopiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 qing3 peng2you3 bang1mang2, huo4zhe3 kan4 zhao4pian4.",
          "translation_en": "I ask a friend for help, or I look at pictures.",
          "translation_ko": "친구에게 도움을 요청하거나 사진을 봐요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你想學看中文嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ xiǎng xué kàn zhōngwén ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 xiang3 xue2 kan4 zhong1wen2 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Do you want to learn to read Chinese?",
          "translation_ko": "중국어 읽기를 배우고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "想，可是寫字很難。",
          "pinyin": "Xiǎng, kěshì xiě zì hěn nán.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xiang3, ke3shi4 xie3 zi4 hen3 nan2.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, but writing characters is hard.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 그런데 글자 쓰기는 어려워요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你可以先學簡單的字。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ kěyǐ xiān xué jiǎndān de zì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ke3yi3 xian1 xue2 jian3dan1 de5 zi4.",
          "translation_en": "You can start by learning simple characters.",
          "translation_ko": "간단한 글자부터 먼저 배울 수 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好，我試試看。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, wǒ shì shì kàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, wo3 shi4 shi4 kan4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll give it a try.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 한번 해볼게요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Can B read Chinese?",
          "question_ko": "B는 중국어를 읽을 수 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Yes, very well", "A little", "Not at all"],
          "options_ko": ["네, 아주 잘해요", "조금요", "전혀 못 해요"],
          "correct_index": 2
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of negative forms and questions.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Can you read Chinese? Is it difficult for you? What do you do when you see Chinese characters you don't understand?"
    }
  ]
}
